_schema.purpose: Language-agnostic field-mapping config for a fillable NYS AcroForm. Directly consumable by the Python reference engine (pipeline/form_fill.py) and, later, the pdf-lib browser client. See data/config/forms/README.md for the full schema.

field_entry.class: 'factual' (auto-fillable from the vendor profile) or 'attestation' (NEVER auto-filled — a person must complete it).
field_entry.type: AcroForm field type as extracted: '/Tx' (text) or '/Btn' (checkbox/radio).
field_entry.profile_key: factual only — the vendor-profile dict key this field maps from.
field_entry.value_map: radio /Btn only — {profile value -> export state}. Used to fill a radio ONLY when value_map_confirmed is true.
field_entry.value_map_confirmed: radio /Btn only — false means the export-state<->label order was NOT confirmed from the real PDF widgets, so the engine must route the field to the UNFILLED list (never guess a checkbox state).

extraction: AcroForm field names extracted via pikepdf from the canonical OSC PDF (17 /Tx + 4 /Btn). Verified against the golden-copy text capture source-ac3237s-substitute-w9.md for layout. Inventory: tests/fixtures/ac3237s_fields.json.

Entity Type.note: Part I item 3 radio, export states /0-/9 (10) but the form shows 11 visual labels (Individual … Other). The export-state<->label binding could NOT be confirmed from the field dump (10 vs 11), so the engine routes this to UNFILLED — the vendor checks the box by hand. Confirm each widget's export value against its Rect/label from the PDF, then populate value_map and set value_map_confirmed:true.

Taxpayer ID Type.note: Part II radio, export states /0-/3 = EIN/SSN/ITIN/N-A per the form text. Provisional order recorded but NOT confirmed against the PDF widgets, so the engine routes this to UNFILLED until confirmed.

Subject to Backup Witholding.note: Part V certification radio. Field name kept verbatim incl. OSC's 'Witholding' typo. Never auto-filled.

Exempt Payee.note: Tax-status claim the vendor must decide — not the engine. Never auto-filled.

Certification Date.note: Signed by a person; never auto-filled.
